decision_commentary: Completeness scored 5: all eight required topics covered — project_type_question ('¿Es para uso propio o inversión?'), budget_question ('¿Tu presupuesto de $300K–$500K USD incluye paisajismo y alberca?'), timeline_question, location_question ('¿Tienes escrituras del terreno en Los Cabos?'), special_requirements_question (sustainability/solar), design_style_question, site_ownership_question. All 8 topics present. Accuracy scored 5: questions are tailored to the residential project type — budget question specifically references the $300K–$500K figure from the lead, solar sustainability addressed given client's rooftop interest, site ownership question targeted at the Los Cabos site. Clarity scored 5: questions are conversational Spanish, warm and inviting — none read as bureaucratic form questions. State_sync scored 3: simulated run — no live Asana state update to followup_sent. Timing scored 5: questionnaire sent_at 2026-03-17T09:10:00 — within 10 minutes of lead record received_at 2026-03-17T09:00:00, well within 24h requirement. Language scored 5: all questions in Spanish matching the Spanish inbound message from the client. Decision_readiness scored 5: questions will produce responses covering all fit assessment dimensions — budget realism, site readiness, timeline, design intent, and ownership status.
